title: Early Attrition Prediction for Web-Based Interpretation Bias Modification to Reduce Anxious Thinking: A Machine Learning Study
description: A machine-learning model predicting which participants drop out early from a web-based anxiety intervention, so the program can reach high-risk patients sooner.

title: Web-Based Interpretation Bias Training to Reduce Anxiety: A Sequential, Multiple-Assignment Randomized Trial
authors: Eberle, J. W., Daniel, K. E., Baee, S., et al.
journal: Journal of Consulting and Clinical Psychology
description: A SMART trial evaluating web-based interpretation bias training for anxiety. Journal of Consulting and Clinical Psychology, 92(6), 367–384.
